topic: My cat brings me small objects every morning from a basement that was bricked over in nineteen seventy four
title: My Cat Brings Me Antique Objects Every Morning From a Basement That Has Been Bricked Over Since 1974 | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My cat brings me objects from a basement that was sealed in nineteen seventy four.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a small antique brass thimble on a white pillow beside a sleeping figure's outline, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Bungalow. Built nineteen twelve. Original owners bricked over the basement after a flood.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior of a single story bungalow in autumn morning light, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I adopted Sage two years ago.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a grey tabby cat seated calmly on a hardwood floor seen from behind, only the back visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: March. Found a brass thimble on my pillow.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of an antique brass thimble resting on a white pillowcase, soft morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Did not match anything I owned.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an open jewelry box on a dresser with various small items inside, no thimble visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Sage was in the hallway. Sitting in front of the brick wall.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a hallway with a brick wall section at the end, a grey tabby cat sitting facing it seen from behind, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Started leaving the bedroom door open.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an open bedroom door from inside, the hallway visible beyond, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each morning a new object. Pearl button. Brass key. A child's wooden top.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of three small antique objects arranged on a bedside table, a pearl button a brass key and a wooden top, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Sage walks through the brick wall. I have watched her. She is on one side. Then the other.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a hallway brick wall with a grey tabby cat's tail visible disappearing into the brick, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The objects are antique. Pre nineteen twenty four. None have been on my floors before.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a wooden table covered with antique objects laid out in chronological order, dim home office lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I asked the previous owner's grandson. He told me about the brick.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of an old family photograph of a child holding a grey tabby cat, sepia toned, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He also told me Sage was his grandmother's cat name.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a grey tabby cat seated on a hallway floor facing a brick wall, only the back of the cat visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing
